project_type: Android app (Kotlin, Jetpack Compose) with pure-Kotlin domain module
build_system: Gradle 8.10.2 multi-module (:app for Android/UI, :domain for pure Kotlin). Requires JAVA_HOME=/opt/toolchains/.local/share/mise/installs/java/17.0.2 because Kotlin 2.0.21 does not support Java 25 properly.
test_framework: JUnit 4 with kotlinx-coroutines-test (runTest). Tests in domain/src/test/kotlin/com/painkiller/domain/. Fake implementations of API interfaces for testing (e.g. MultiFakeApi pattern).
verification_instructions: 1. Run JAVA_HOME=/opt/toolchains/.local/share/mise/installs/java/17.0.2 ./gradlew :domain:test to verify domain tests. 2. :app:assembleDebug cannot run locally (no Android SDK) but CI handles it. 3. Verify new domain code compiles cleanly with :domain:build.
setup_instructions: JAVA_HOME=/opt/toolchains/.local/share/mise/installs/java/17.0.2 must be set for all Gradle commands.
environment_constraints: No Android SDK available locally. :app module cannot be assembled locally. CI (GitHub Actions) handles Android builds. Java 17 is required (Java 25 breaks Kotlin 2.0.21). Network available for dependencies.
contribution_requirements: One coherent commit. No new libraries. force=false safety invariant must be maintained on updateRef. Use existing PainkillerHttpClient, SecureTokenStore, PainkillerContainer. No Hilt/DI frameworks. Keep domain module free of Android imports.
key_patterns: API interface in domain (GithubGitDataApi), HTTP impl in app (KtorGithubGitDataApi) using execute() wrapper + withBearer(requireToken()). Orchestrators in domain (SingleFileCommitOrchestrator pattern). ViewModels with ViewModelProvider.Factory companion. Repository wrappers in app that check token before delegating to domain orchestrator. Manual DI via PainkillerContainer lazy singletons. NavHost with route constants. StateFlow for UI state. Error mapping via GithubGitDataException sealed class.
directory_structure: GRID/ root. domain/ = pure Kotlin business logic (no Android). app/ = Android UI + data layer. domain/src/main/kotlin/com/painkiller/domain/ for domain models/orchestrators. domain/src/test/kotlin/ for domain tests. app/src/main/java/com/painkiller/ for app code (data/, di/, ui/). ui/ has auth/, flow/, components/, navigation/, screens/, theme/ subdirs.
